name: expenditure-on-consultancies-by-the-department-of-primary-industries
title: Expenditure on consultancies by the Department of Primary Industries
notes:
This spreadsheet provides information on consultancy work engaged by the
Department during the 2010 - 2011 financial year, which were valued between
$10,000 and $100,000. It includes information on the consultant firm, the
purpose of the consultancy, the duration of the consultancy and expenditure.
Aggregate expenditure information is also provided on consultancy work less
than $10,000.

resources.name: Expenditure on consultancies by the Department of Primary Industries
